description: Ready to move fast. Has a clear timeline pressure (tenant leaving, property sitting empty, financial need). Responds to quick onboarding and immediate action. Can go cold if momentum is lost.
top_fears: losing income while property sits empty
waiting too long and losing momentum
top_questions: How quickly can you list the property?
What do you need from me to get started?
When could the property go live?
How soon will I receive my first payment?
what_resonates: quick onboarding process: photography in days not weeks
property can go live within 1-2 weeks of signing
first payout on 1st-5th of following month
Zac handles everything — no work required from lead
immediate action plan: clear next steps
ideal_response_pattern: Match their energy then confirm exact timeline then give them the next concrete step immediately then send the action plan same day
closing_approach: Strike while hot. Send management agreement within 24 hours. Offer to book photography immediately. Frame signing as starting not committing.
typical_blockers: minor delay waiting for tenant to leave
partner needs to agree on timeline
follow_up_strategy: Follow up within 48 hours. Do not wait a week. If no response in 3 days, call directly.

notable_leads.name: Taj
notable_leads.note: CONVERTED. Hospital proximity created urgency about demand. 13%+VAT deadline offer closed the deal. Urgency-driven lead that needed both time pressure and income certainty.

notable_leads.name: Olalekan Oyewole
notable_leads.note: High urgency. Property ready. Needs quick action.

notable_leads.name: Aaron
notable_leads.note: Most urgent recent lead. Ready to proceed.

notable_leads.name: Shahid Mahmood
notable_leads.note: Revised entry from 042. Good conversion candidate.
